title: Prefer using assertIsInstance over other unittest assertion functions
description: Avoid using assertEqual, assertNotEqual, etc., when assertIsInstance would be more appropriate. This rule promotes consistency and readability in code.
message: Prefer using assertIsInstance over other unittest assertion functions
recommendation: Use assertIsInstance when checking the type of a variable
why_is_this_an_issue: Using inappropriate assertion functions can lead to misunderstandings and errors
how_to_fix: Replace assertEqual, assertNotEqual, etc., with assertIsInstance when checking the type of a variable

logic.new_check_type_doc: Matches unittest assertion functions other than assertIsInstance

metadata.title: Prefer using assertIsInstance over other unittest assertion functions
